name: The Best Beef Stew
recipeInstructions:
boneless short rib, blade or rump roast
1. In a large Dutch oven or oven-proof casserole with lid, heat half the butter and oil over medium heat.
2. Cook onions until beginning to brown, about 10 minutes.
3. Reduce heat to low. Cook onions for another 7 to 10 minutes or until very tender and golden.
4. Remove onions; set aside.
5. Wipe casserole clean.
6. Lightly coat meat in flour, shaking off excess.
7. Heat remaining butter and oil in the casserole over medium-high heat.
8. Add meat in batches (pieces should not touch) and brown well on both sides.
9. Pour off any fat.
10. Add beer and bring to boil, stirring to scrape up brown bits from the bottom.
11. Simmer beer over medium heat until reduced by one-third, about three minutes.
12. Return onions and beef to casserole, along with tomatoes and their juices, oregano, thyme, and salt.
13. Cover snugly. Cook in preheated 325°F oven for 1 3/4 to 2 hours or until meat is fork tender.
14. Heat olive oil in a heavy skillet.
15. Add mushrooms. Cook over medium heat about 5 minutes, turning at intervals, until nicely browned.
16. Add mushrooms to stew.
17. Adjust seasoning with salt and pepper.
18. Garnish with parsley.
Makes 4 to 6 servings.
